name: consumer_finance_communications_stonehaven_car_fair
premise: A Consumer Finance response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving consumer finance communications stonehaven car fair. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as care vs fairness under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Leila Bennett
agents.identity: I am Leila Bennett, accountable for a defensible call in Consumer Finance when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays fairness for care.

agents.name: Ansel Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Ansel Vasquez, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Consumer Finance.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so fairness isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of care.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect fairness.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to fairness to secure care under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Leila Bennett must decide under care vs fairness. What does Leila Bennett do?
